name: Spicy Black Bean & Lentil Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 large Red potatoes, cooked and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the black beans in one bowl and the lentils in another.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the mustard, garlic, parsley, vinegar, lemon juice, salt, olive oil, and crushed red peppers until well combined.
3. Divide the mixture evenly between the bowls of legumes.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour to allow the flavors to marinate.
5. When ready to serve, place a bed of lettuce on each salad plate.
6. Top with sliced bell peppers.
7. Arrange small piles of cooked potatoes, carrots, and legumes on top of the vegetables.
8. Drizzle the marinade over the salad.
